name: @jsonschema-form/root
description: A modular, tiny, well-architected JSON Schema form library

scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit -p packages/core && tsc --noEmit -p packages/core/tsconfig.test.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/input-jsonschema && tsc --noEmit -p packages/input-jsonschema/tsconfig.test.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/input-zod && tsc --noEmit -p packages/input-zod/tsconfig.test.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/input-conformance && tsc --noEmit -p packages/react/tsconfig.src.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/react/tsconfig.test.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/vanilla && tsc --noEmit -p packages/vanilla/tsconfig.test.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/validation-ajv && tsc --noEmit -p packages/validation-ajv/tsconfig.test.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/validation-contract && tsc --noEmit -p packages/validation-zod && tsc --noEmit -p packages/validation-zod/tsconfig.test.json && tsc --noEmit -p examples/basic-react/tsconfig.json
scripts.gate: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm run test

author: Tim Kindberg
